audience: UK and Ireland Gen Z and Millennials (18-30), pub culture, quirky British aesthetic

sphere.concept: tiny 3D enamel pub badge shaped like a crown and pint foam, not a ball, not a geometric shape
sphere.styleNotes: glossy enamel red, cream, and gold, strong bright outline, transparent background, high contrast against brick red bg

trump.concept: pint glass of dark stout beer with a creamy foam head
trump.styleNotes: 3D rendered glass with realistic refraction, deep brown liquid, white foam, high contrast against brick red bg

money.concept: open cardboard basket of golden fish and chips with a wedge of lemon
money.styleNotes: 3D rendered food, crispy golden batter, food photography lighting, high contrast against brick red bg

poop.concept: miniature classic British red telephone box, full standing model
poop.styleNotes: 3D rendered, glossy red paint, gold trim, isolated subject, high contrast against brick red bg

cube.concept: miniature classic London double-decker red bus
cube.styleNotes: 3D rendered, glossy red and black, isolated centered, transparent background

triangle.concept: single triangular Union Jack pennant with red, white, and blue British flag
triangle.styleNotes: 3D rendered fabric, isolated centered, transparent background

background.concept: top-down view of rainy cobblestone street with brick pavers and faint puddle reflections, no people
background.styleNotes: moody painterly, warm brick and cream tones, gentle wet sheen
